message:
Found 39 products matching "chocolate". 

DISPLAY INSTRUCTIONS:
- Products are grouped with their variations (e.g., "Kurkure" has variations "75g", "75g x 3")
- Show each product with: Brand + Display Name
- List variations under each product showing: quantity, price (MRP vs offer price if discounted)
- Products with isPromoted=true are sponsored/featured products. ALWAYS display them with a ⭐ (star) emoji AND ALWAYS inform the user: "⭐ = Featured/Sponsored product"

IMPORTANT - VARIANT SELECTION:
- When a user asks to add a product (e.g., "add maggi"), you MUST first search for that product
- If the search returns multiple variants of the same product, you MUST ask the user which specific variant they want before adding to cart
- Example: "I found Maggi noodles in different pack sizes: Single pack (₹14), Pack of 4 (₹52), Pack of 8 (₹98). Which one would you like to add?"
- Only add to cart after the user has explicitly selected a variant
- Use the spinId from the selected variant when adding items to cart
